name: recon-toolkit
description: A modular reconnaissance framework that chains nmap, gobuster, and custom scripts to automate initial target enumeration during penetration tests.

name: ad-enum
description: Active Directory enumeration tool built on top of Impacket and BloodHound data. Automates common AD attack paths and generates a prioritised attack report.

name: payload-factory
description: Collection of obfuscated payload templates for C2 callbacks. Supports Cobalt Strike, Sliver, and custom listeners. Evades common EDR solutions.

name: http-smuggler
description: HTTP request smuggling detection and exploitation toolkit. Automates CL.TE, TE.CL, and TE.TE desync attacks against web proxies and CDNs.

name: powershell-arsenal
description: Collection of offensive PowerShell scripts for post-exploitation. Includes AMSI bypass techniques, credential dumping helpers, and lateral movement modules.

name: ctf-writeups
description: Repository of CTF challenge write-ups covering binary exploitation, reverse engineering, web challenges, and cryptography from HackTheBox, TryHackMe, and various CTF events.
